key_items: Bitcoin ETF flows reverse as US funds shed $1B amid inflation fears - most severe weekly capital flight since end of January
US Treasury yields surge to new highs as liquidity tightens, pushing Bitcoin back below $82,000 resistance
BlackRock just sold $317 million worth of Bitcoin as institutional investors pull hundreds of millions during market reversal
reasoning: Macro headwinds are overwhelming micro bullish catalysts as rising Treasury yields and capital flight from institutional investors create downward pressure on BTC. The bear trap narrative suggests limited downside capitulation, but the $1B+ weekly ETF outflows and liquidity tightening indicate the bond market has reasserted control over crypto trading.
risks: Further Treasury yield spikes or negative US economic data could trigger accelerated institutional liquidations, pushing BTC toward the $75K-$76K support levels mentioned by technical analysts.
